Case# CWErr.cwReferenceNotBoundErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwReferenceNotBoundErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwreferencenotbounderr#Discussion)

No interface is bound to the CWInterface.
